heading: Definitions
label: 7803 Definitions
notes: Amendments2008—Par. (1)(A). substituted “Foreign Affairs” for “International Relations”.Pub. L. 110–346
amendments: Amendments2008—Par. (1)(A). substituted “Foreign Affairs” for “International Relations”.Pub. L. 110–346

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate.

children.heading: China
children.label: 2 China
children.text: The term “China” means the People’s Republic of China.

children.heading: Humanitarian assistance
children.label: 3 Humanitarian assistance
children.text: The term “humanitarian assistance” means assistance to meet humanitarian needs, including needs for food, medicine, medical supplies, clothing, and shelter.

children.heading: North Korea
children.label: 4 North Korea
children.text: The term “North Korea” means the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea.

children.heading: North Koreans
children.label: 5 North Koreans
children.text: The term “North Koreans” means persons who are citizens or nationals of North Korea.

children.heading: South Korea
children.label: 6 South Korea
children.text: The term “South Korea” means the Republic of Korea.
